instruction:
Apply the exact harbor patch: sail-main flipped, buoy-red-stripe was recolored, cabin-window moved, stray-pier-rope was added, and rope-coil path changed.

Patch:
- rope-coil.d: "M48 84 C62 70 74 80 68 90 C60 102 44 92 54 82 C62 74 66 86 60 90" -> "M48 82 C58 72 70 74 70 84 C70 94 54 96 50 88 C46 80 60 78 62 86"
- remove stray-pier-rope
- cabin-window.x: 106 -> 114
- cabin-window.y: 70 -> 67
- buoy-red-stripe.fill: "#22c55e" -> "#ef4444"
- sail-main.points: [[144.66666666666669,30],[116.66666666666669,76],[144.66666666666669,76]] -> [[126,30],[154,76],[126,76]]
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 220 140" width="220" height="140">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="220" height="140" fill="#fbfff4" />
  <rect id="sky" fill="#e0f2fe" x="0" y="0" width="220" height="70" />
  <rect id="water" fill="#0284c7" x="0" y="70" width="220" height="70" />
  <line id="horizon" stroke="#0284c7" stroke-width="2" x1="0" y1="70" x2="220" y2="70" />
  <circle id="sun" fill="#fde047" cx="190" cy="22" r="12" />
  <ellipse id="cloud-left" fill="#ffffff" cx="36" cy="26" rx="18" ry="7" />
  <ellipse id="cloud-right" fill="#ffffff" cx="56" cy="25" rx="14" ry="6" />
  <rect id="pier-deck" fill="#92400e" x="0" y="88" width="72" height="10" />
  <path id="rope-coil" fill="none" stroke="#f8fafc" stroke-width="2" d="M48 84 C62 70 74 80 68 90 C60 102 44 92 54 82 C62 74 66 86 60 90" />
  <line id="pier-leg-1" stroke="#451a03" stroke-width="4" x1="16" y1="96" x2="13" y2="132" />
  <line id="pier-leg-2" stroke="#451a03" stroke-width="4" x1="56" y1="96" x2="60" y2="132" />
  <polygon id="boat-hull" fill="#92400e" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" points="84,84 158,84 146,104 96,104" />
  <rect id="boat-cabin" fill="#fef3c7" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="106" y="62" width="30" height="20" />
  <rect id="cabin-window" fill="#93c5fd" stroke="#222" stroke-width="0.8" x="106" y="70" width="14" height="8" />
  <line id="mast" stroke="#222" stroke-width="3" x1="126" y1="84" x2="126" y2="26" />
  <polygon id="sail-main" fill="#f8fafc" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" points="144.66666666666669,30 116.66666666666669,76 144.66666666666669,76" />
  <polygon id="sail-small" fill="#e0f2fe" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" points="124,34 100,76 124,76" />
  <polygon id="flag" fill="#84cc16" points="126,25 140,29 126,33" />
  <polygon id="lighthouse-body" fill="#fee2e2" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" points="176,82 206,82 200,28 182,28" />
  <rect id="lighthouse-stripe-1" fill="#ef4444" x="181" y="48" width="20" height="7" />
  <rect id="lighthouse-stripe-2" fill="#ef4444" x="179" y="64" width="24" height="7" />
  <rect id="lighthouse-cap" fill="#0f172a" x="180" y="22" width="22" height="8" />
  <rect id="lighthouse-window" fill="#fde047" stroke="#222" stroke-width="0.7" x="188" y="34" width="6" height="8" />
  <polygon id="light-beam" fill="#fde68a" opacity="0.45" points="180,30 132,18 132,42" />
  <circle id="buoy-red" fill="#f8fafc" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" cx="42" cy="112" r="8" />
  <rect id="buoy-red-stripe" fill="#22c55e" x="35" y="110" width="14" height="4" />
  <circle id="buoy-green" fill="#f8fafc" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" cx="184" cy="112" r="7" />
  <rect id="buoy-green-stripe" fill="#22c55e" x="178" y="110" width="12" height="4" />
  <polyline id="wave-1" fill="none" stroke="#0ea5e9" stroke-width="2" points="6,122 22,118 38,122 54,118 70,122" />
  <path id="harbor-wave-long" fill="none" stroke="#0ea5e9" stroke-width="2" d="M82 118 C98 112 112 124 128 118 S158 112 174 118" />
  <polyline id="wave-2" fill="none" stroke="#0ea5e9" stroke-width="2" points="128,120 146,116 164,120 182,116 200,120" />
  <rect id="crate-left" fill="#a16207" stroke="#451a03" stroke-width="1" x="12" y="76" width="14" height="12" />
  <rect id="crate-right" fill="#b45309" stroke="#451a03" stroke-width="1" x="28" y="76" width="14" height="12" />

  <path id="skin-13-anchor-wide-hook" fill="none" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="7" opacity="0.9" d="M0 104 C18 136 52 136 66 104" />
  <circle id="identity-13-anchor-ring" fill="none" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="3" cx="28" cy="35" r="8" />
  <line id="identity-13-anchor-stem" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="4" x1="28" y1="43" x2="28" y2="86" />
  <line id="identity-13-anchor-bar" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="3" x1="15" y1="58" x2="41" y2="58" />
  <path id="identity-13-anchor-hook" fill="none" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="4" d="M8 76 C16 96 40 96 48 76" />
  <circle id="variant-13-dot" fill="#84cc16" opacity="0.72" cx="39" cy="13" r="2.6" />
  <line id="variant-13-rule" stroke="#84cc16" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.58" x1="45" y1="16" x2="61" y2="14" />
  <rect id="variant-13-chip-01" fill="#f97316" opacity="0.68" x="9" y="5" width="8" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-13-chip-02" fill="#f59e0b" opacity="0.68" x="46" y="6" width="9" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-13-chip-03" fill="#84cc16" opacity="0.68" x="77" y="4" width="7" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-13-chip-04" fill="#22c55e" opacity="0.68" x="114" y="5" width="8" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-13-chip-05" fill="#14b8a6" opacity="0.68" x="145" y="6" width="9" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-13-chip-06" fill="#06b6d4" opacity="0.68" x="182" y="4" width="7" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-13-chip-07" fill="#3b82f6" opacity="0.68" x="9" y="140" width="8" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-13-chip-08" fill="#6366f1" opacity="0.68" x="46" y="139" width="9" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-13-chip-09" fill="#8b5cf6" opacity="0.68" x="77" y="141" width="7" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-13-chip-10" fill="#d946ef" opacity="0.68" x="114" y="140" width="8" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-13-chip-11" fill="#ec4899" opacity="0.68" x="145" y="139" width="9" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-13-chip-12" fill="#ef4444" opacity="0.68" x="182" y="141" width="7" height="4" rx="1" />
  <circle id="variant-13-pin-01" fill="#f59e0b" opacity="0.66" cx="27" cy="25" r="2.05" />
  <circle id="variant-13-pin-02" fill="#84cc16" opacity="0.66" cx="212" cy="39" r="2.3" />
  <circle id="variant-13-pin-03" fill="#22c55e" opacity="0.66" cx="13" cy="53" r="2.55" />
  <circle id="variant-13-pin-04" fill="#14b8a6" opacity="0.66" cx="198" cy="67" r="1.8" />
  <circle id="variant-13-pin-05" fill="#06b6d4" opacity="0.66" cx="23" cy="81" r="2.05" />
  <circle id="variant-13-pin-06" fill="#3b82f6" opacity="0.66" cx="208" cy="95" r="2.3" />
  <circle id="variant-13-pin-07" fill="#6366f1" opacity="0.66" cx="9" cy="109" r="2.55" />
  <circle id="variant-13-pin-08" fill="#8b5cf6" opacity="0.66" cx="194" cy="123" r="1.8" />
  <polyline id="stray-pier-rope" fill="none" stroke="#f8fafc" stroke-width="2" points="8,84 20,80 32,84" />
</svg>
